name: Auden Techno Corp.
summary: Auden Techno Corp. researches, develops, designs, manufactures, and sells various antennas in Taiwan and internationally. It is also involved in equipment marketing, and test and certification businesses. The company offers CB electronic antennas, mobile phone GSM antennas, and wireless local-area network antennas; ultra-wideband and RFID application antennas; and miniature multi-frequency antenna modules, as well as 4G LTE/MIMO technology and biological electromagnetic wave products. Its products are used in mobile communications, automotive electronics, Internet communications, and digital and industrial applications. In addition, the company provides development, testing, mass production, and after-sales services; and antenna simulation, and design and measurement services. Auden Techno Corp. was founded in 1981 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
